verses.text: “ Topa na Pasian un luah dinga na tumna uh leitangah hong paipihin, note' mai-ah Hit mite, Girgash mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, leh Jebus mite, note sangin lianzaw-in a thahatzaw minam sagihte note' mai panin siangkhia sakin

Topa na Pasian un note tungah amaute hong pia-in, note in amaute na zawh uh ciangin, note in amaute na susiamang ding uh hi. Amaute tawh thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh a, amaute tungah hehpihna na lak kei ding uh hi
Amaute tawh kiteng loin, na tanute uh amau' tapate pialoin, a tanute uh na tapate uh-a' dingin na la kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh pasian dangte' na a sem dingin Topa zuihna panin na tapate uh amaute in heikhia ding uh hi. Tua ciangin no tungah Topa hong hehin note hong susia pak ding hi
Amaute tungah hih bangin note na gamta ding uh hi: A biakna taute uh phelsakin, a biakna songte uh dengzanin, amau' Asherah milimte phuksakin, a kiseek a milimte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Topa note' Pasian' tungah a siangtho mi na hi uh hi. Leitunga om mite khempeuh sung panin ama mi ahi dingin Topa na Pasian un note hong teelzo hi
“ Topa in note hong itin hong teelna pen midangte sangin na tamzawkna hang uh hilo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh lakah a tawmpen na hi uh hi
Topa in salsuahna Egypt kumpipa Faro' khutsung panin note hong honkhia-in a vangliatna tawh hong paikhiatpihna pen Topa in note hong itin, na pate uh tunga a kiciam thuciam a zuihna hang ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh amah bek ahi Pasian hi a, amah itin a thupiakna a zuite tungah khang tul khat dongin thuciamna leh itna kip lenin a thuman Pasian
amah a mudah mite, suksiatna tawh a thukpahpa ahihna thei un. Amah a mudah mi tungah zekai loin a maitang mahah thuk ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin tuni-a no kong piak thute khempeuh limtakin na zuih ding uh ngaihsun un.
“Note in hih ngeina kipte za-in, kemin tuate na zuihna hangun, Topa na Pasian un na pu na pate uh tungah a ciam thuciamna leh itna kip note tungah hong tungsak ding hi

Amah in note hong itin, tampi hong phasak ding hi. Amah in note tungah piak dingin na pu na pate uh tungah a ciam gam sungah note' suanlekhakte leh na gamsung panun a piangte, na an uh leh na leenggahzu uh leh na sathau uh, leh na ganhingte uh pungsakin, na tuulekeelno honte uh zong thupha pia ding hi
Midangte khempeuh sangin note thupha hong kilim piakzaw ding hi. Note' lak hita leh na ganhingte uh lak hita lehah a nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a ciing omlo ding hi

Topa in note' tung panin natna khempeuh lakhia ding hi. Note in na theihsa uh ahi Egypt gama natna siate note' tungah khat zong hong tunglo ding a, ahih hangin no hong mudahte khempeuh tungah tuate tungsak ding hi
Topa na Pasian un note tungah hong piak mi khempeuh na beisak ding uh a, amaute na khasiat kei ding uh hi. Note-a' dingin thangzak hi ding ahih manin amau' pasian-te zong na bia kei ding uh hi
“Na lungsim uhah, ‘Hih minamte ei sangin tamzaw hi. Amaute bangci suankhiat zawh ding ihi hiam?’ na cih khak uh leh
amaute na kihta kei ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un Faro leh Egypt mite khempeuh tungah a hih

na mitte un a muhsa a lian ze-etnate, limte, na lamdangte, a vangliatna leh Topa na Pasian un hong paikhiatpihna a thahatna na phawk ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un na kihtak uh mi khempeuh tungah tua bangin hih ding hi
Tua thamloin, a omlai mite leh no kiang panin a bu mite a siat khit dong matengin Topa na Pasian un amaute' lakah tunpi khah ding hi
Note in amaute na kihta kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a lian a kihtakhuai ahi Pasian, Topa na Pasian uh note tawh a om hi
Topa na Pasian un note' mai-ah hih minamte tawm tawmin siang khiasak ding hi. Note-a' dingin gamsate hong tam khan'lua khading ahih manin thakhatthu-in amaute na beisak kei ding uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian un note tungah amaute hong pia ding a, amaute a bei matengin kibuaisak ding hi

Amah in note' khutsungah amaute' kumpite hong pia ding a, note in mun khempeuh panin amaute' min na maimangsak ding uh hi. Amaute na susiamang khin ding uh a, note' langkhatah mi khat beek hong pang zolo ding hi

A kiseek amau' pasian milimte mei tawh na hal ding uh hi. Tua nate-ah na awk khaklohna dingun amaute' tunga a om kham leh ngun deihgawh loin, note-a' dingin na la kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa na Pasian uh tungah a kihhuai ahi hi

Note' inn sungah a kihhuai nate na tumpih kei ding uh a, tua nate tawh kibangin samsiat a thuak mi na kisuaksak kei ding uh hi. Note in tua nate mudah mahmahin na kih ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nate a kisamsia na ahi hi.
